hero.title: Build something great
hero.subtitle: A modern website built with Nibbly CMS.

0.content: Nibbly turns any HTML page into an editable website. No database, no build tools, no complexity.

1.content: Edit content directly on the page when logged in. Visitors see clean HTML with zero editor markup.

0.title: Fast
0.desc: No database means instant page loads.

1.title: Secure
1.desc: No SQL injection possible. Minimal attack surface.

2.title: Easy Editing
2.desc: Edit content directly on the page when logged in.

0.question: How do I install Nibbly?
0.answer: Upload the files to your server and visit /admin/setup.php in your browser.

1.question: Do I need a database?
1.answer: No. Nibbly stores all content as JSON files. No database setup required.

2.question: Can I use my own design?
2.answer: Yes. Edit the CSS custom properties in style.css to match your brand colors and fonts.

0.name: Free
0.desc: Everything you need to get started.
0.features:
Unlimited pages
Inline editor
Automatic backups
Multi-language support

1.name: Pro
1.features:
Everything in Free
Priority support
Custom integrations
Advanced analytics
